name: feature-control-plane-page
description: Create FeatureControlPlanePage - main page composing all components into unified control plane layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Three-column layout: FeatureSessionSelector (left, narrow), FeatureChatPanel (center), EntityDataPanel (right)
SkillCycleStepper at top spanning full width
Loads FeatureSessions from platform-features schema on mount
Passes selected session to child components
SkillCycleStepper shows status of selected session
When no session selected, shows empty state prompting selection
Uses observer() from mobx-react-lite for reactive updates from chat domain
Responsive: panels stack on smaller screens
SchemaVisualizer modal accessible via button when session.schemaName exists
